card_description: The Deceiver is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick concludes this set of entries by asserting that 70 AD is the "omphalos" (navel) of reality around which all "linear" history circularity warps."
